title: chamaq #2559
definition:
1) to withdraw, turn around, turn away
    1a) (Qal) to turn away
    1b) (Hithpael) to turn about, vacillate, turn hither and thither
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to withdraw, turn around, turn away
    1a) (Qal) to turn away
    1b) (Hithpael) to turn about, vacillate, turn hither and thither

    NASB:  to turn away
